title: A MODERN VIEW ON AN INTEGRATED APPROACH TO THE REHABILITATION OF PATIENTS WITH POSTOPERATIVE JAW DEFECTS
author: Tulyaganov Jamshid Shovkatovich
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: When analyzing domestic and foreign studies, several directions are determined for solving the problem of rehabilitation of patients with maxillofacial profile with difficult clinical conditions of the prosthetic bed and field. Today, in the rehabilitation of patients with postoperative defects of the maxillofacial region, it is important to use modern digital protocols in diagnosis and further orthopedic rehabilitation.
steps_raw: When analyzing domestic and foreign studies, several directions are determined for solving the problem of rehabilitation of patients with maxillofacial profile with difficult clinical conditions of the prosthetic bed and field. Today, in the rehabilitation of patients with postoperative defects of the maxillofacial region, it is important to use modern digital protocols in diagnosis and further orthopedic rehabilitation.
